parsed_output.justification: Most of the discussion focuses on truth‑testing around a reveal event; Justin repeatedly claims to have seen or looked at other players’ cards and asserts knowledge of werewolves in the center. Several lines suggest he is the one who turned another player’s card face‑up, implying he was the reveal, and the others’ doubts and accusations converge on him. All evidence points to him being the guy who deliberately extracted that information, a classic trait of a werewolf who knows who is who and seeks to mislead. Thus it is most probable that his final ending role is WEREWOLF.
